narrative:
Hamilton Township has 7,486 registered voters, with 65.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
